description: originally a branch of a civilian rebotics company, Golman refocused the designs on military applications. Due to the continuos and cheap production of autonomous units, Golman armies excel at consistent damage output.

rule.name: Pack Tactics
rule.description: When you Order an Created Autonomous unit to Move, you may either Advance it or Move an extra Autonomous unit instead.

scheme.name: Assured Destruction
scheme.description:
If your non-Created units have less total damage than your opponent's, you gain 3 VP.
Otherwise, you gain 1 CP.

commands.name: Broadcast: Advance
commands.targets: All Autonomous Units on your army

commands.name: Ramping Production
commands.effects:
Until the end of the Cycle, ignore your K-mine unit limit.
At the end of the Cycle, if you exceed this limit, repeatedly choose an allied K-mine unit to Fire until your number of K-mine units equals the limit.

abilities.name: Compressed Bitrate
abilities.description: Up to 2 Autonomous Units within 3 Tiles of this unit do not count towards their unit limit.

abilities.name: Robotic Storage
abilities.description:
This vehicle can transport 2 Infantry units if they are both Autonomous.
Embark and Disembark Orders to and from this Transport can target 2 Infantry units if they are both Autonomous.

abilities.name: K-mine Factory
abilities.description:
As a Secondary Action: create a K-mine on this unit's tile. It is a 2/N/0/1 Golman Autonomous Infantry Created unit. Equip it with an AP Mine or AT Mine.
This ability has Loading 2

abilities.name: Process Parenting
abilities.description: For each allied Fabricator beyond the first, your K-mine unit limit is increased by 2.

abilities.name: Mobile Production
abilities.description:
As a Primary Action: create a K-mine on this unit's tile. It is a 2/N/0/1 Golman Autonomous Infantry Created unit. Equip it with an AP Mine or AT Mine.
This ability has Loading 2

abilities.name: Distributed Bandwidth
abilities.description:
As a Primary Action: you get extra 2 Secondary Orders this turn.
This ability has Loading 2.

abilities.name: Targetting Uplink
abilities.description: When the attached unit hits an enemy: until end of turn, shots from allied Autonomous Units against that enemy have +2 AP.

abilities.name: Support: Any
abilities.description: This support can be attached to any unit.

abilities.name: Detonation
abilities.description: When you Fire this unit, ignore the Fire roll penalty, then destroy it

abilities.name: K-mine Limit
abilities.description: You may have at most 4 K-mine units at any time (modified by abilities).
